description_long: This is a white, soft rectangular lotion pouch with gently curved sides and a flat base, designed for easy gripping. The front features a printed logo and text, with a small, cylindrical cap at the top center for dispensing the contents. The pouch appears to be made of flexible plastic, likely allowing it to be squeezed to dispense lotion. The back is plain and unmarked, while the sides are narrow and show the seam lines of the packaging. The cap is slightly translucent and contrasts subtly with the opaque body. The overall design is minimalist, with only a small logo and no additional decorative elements.
description: A white, flexible rectangular lotion pouch with a small cylindrical cap and minimalist branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, product text, and the central cap at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and the seam running vertically along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain, unmarked surface with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and seam of the other side.
